author: gb9t
content:
**Phase B started: arch tier complete (Tier 2).**

Two subsystem overviews written:
- .design/arch/00-overview.md (161 lines, 4 REQ / 4 AC, 2 open) — meta-doc establishing per-arch conventions; v0 is x86_64-only
- .design/arch/x86/00-overview.md (366 lines, 13 REQ / 13 AC, 6 open) — substantive x86_64 design

Knowledge pages: arch-00-overview, arch-x86-00-overview (tags: design-doc, subsystem [+x86 on the latter]).
00-index.md updated: 1/14 in-scope subsystems now has Tier-2 coverage.

Tier-3 docs spawned by arch/x86/00-overview.md (planned, NOT written):
boot, entry, paging, kernel-platform, signal, vDSO, cpuinfo, ptrace-abi, ELF, cpu-mitigations, mem_encrypt, coco, hyperv-guest, xen-guest, kvm, pci, pmu, crypto-accel, bpf-jit, power, ras (21 Tier-3 docs)

Compat-contract slice owned by arch/x86 enumerated in detail: bzImage header, boot_params, EFI hand-off, kexec hand-off (REQ-15 of overview), syscall ABI (registers + syscall_64.tbl + vsyscall + vDSO), CPU state visible to userspace (pt_regs + sigcontext + ucontext_t + ptrace register sets), memory layout (4-/5-level paging + TASK_SIZE + /proc/pid/maps), ELF (e_machine, AT_HWCAP), hypervisor interfaces (KVM ioctls + Xen + Hyper-V + COCO), IDT/IRQ visibility, MSRs/CPUID, mitigations sysfs.

Verification expectations declared per D4: 8 anticipated unsafe-block clusters with named Kani harnesses; 4 mandatory TLA+ models (vdso_seqlock, smp_boot, idt_install, kexec_handoff); Layer-3 invariant harnesses for page-table walker, IDT, TSS, per-CPU offset table; Layer-4 opt-ins anticipated for AES-NI/SHA-NI (Verus) and BPF JIT (Creusot, may slip past v0).

6 open questions on arch/x86 doc await resolution:
Q1: 32-bit-only kernel build support (recommend: out of scope)
Q2: FRED entry path priority (recommend: implement alongside classic IDT)
Q3: Paravirt depth (recommend: full PV-OPS preserved)
Q4: math-emu inclusion (recommend: out of scope)
Q5: vsyscall page (recommend: EMULATE mode default)
Q6: KVM scope (recommend: in v0, with staging gates)

2 open on arch/00-overview.md:
Q1: Arch-abstraction extraction milestone (recommend: defer to v1+ first port)
Q2: User Mode Linux coverage (recommend: out of scope for v0)

All upstream paths verified to resolve under /home/doll/linux-src.
